figures.caption: Table 1. Definitions of core terminology used in TestGeneralizer.

Fig. 3. Overview of TestGeneralizer: Given a focal method, an initial test, and the codebase, TestGeneralizer generalizes the initial test into additional tests that comprehensively cover intended scenarios. The retriever is implemented using predefined CodeQL and JDTLS script templates instantiated with LLM-generated queries.
Table 5. Branch and line coverage achieved by TestGeneralizer (powered by gpt-o4-mini) and baselines.
Table 4. Comparison of TestGeneralizer and baselines in test scenario coverage (in %).

Table 2. Prompt template for generating test scenario templates. Green-highlighted contents are case-specific and are to be filled in accordingly. Gray-highlighted contents are predefined definitions and instructions.

Fig. 2. Test cases for the focal method setPaint(), covering three test scenarios. The tests follow a common pattern consisting of five parts (highlighted by colored backgrounds), which collectively validate the requirement behind the focal method.
Fig. 4. Generated test scenario template for setPaint() using linearGradientPaint() as the initial test.
